title: Instrument d'adhésion lituanien

pages.text:
Licturos Respublikos Prexidentas

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention on the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and

Development was done at Paris on 14 December 1960,

AND WHEREAS pursuant to Article 16 of the said Convention the Council of the

Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development by its decision of 3 May 2018 invited the Republic of Lithuania to accede to the said Convention,

NOW THEREFORE I, Dalia GRYBAUSKAITE, President of the Republic of Lithuania, hereby formally declare that the Seimas of the Republic of Lithuania, having considered the said Convention, ratified the same and the Republic of Lithuania accedes to the said

Convention and undertakes faithfully to perform and carry out the stipulations contained therein.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed this Instrument of Accession and affixed the seal of the President of the Republic of Lithuania.

DONE at Vilnius on 2 July 2018

Stra GRYBAUSKAITE

Linas LINKEVIČIUS

Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Lithuania
